_publications._publicationTitle: Natural history of meningioma development in mice reveals: a synergy of Nf2 and p16(Ink4a) mutations.

_contextSnippet: MRI allowed the diagnosis of meningothelial proliferation with a sensitivity of 70% and a specificity of 78%... Pathological gadolinium enhancement was observed in 75% of the intracranial mouse meningiomas
details: Detected meningothelial proliferation with 70% sensitivity and 78% specificity; detected 75% of intracranial mouse meningiomas with gadolinium enhancement
